name: demo-reel
description: Generate narrated product demo videos: Playwright records browser walkthroughs, Gemini TTS provides the voiceover, ffmpeg stitches them together. Includes record, multi-speaker, and compose skills.

gemini_api_key.title: Gemini API key
gemini_api_key.description: Used for text-to-speech narration. Get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey

default_voice.title: Default narrator voice
default_voice.description: Gemini TTS voice for single-narrator demos. Options: Kore, Puck, Aoede, Enceladus, Charon, Fenrir. Can be overridden per-demo in scenes.json.

default_model.title: Gemini TTS model
default_model.description: Override the default TTS model. Leave blank to use the recommended preview model.
